content.query:
select * into EDW.DIM_Branch_Zip_backup_marlin from EDW.DIM_Branch_Zip


select * into EDW.DIM_Branch_Zip_backup_marlin_2 from EDW.DIM_Branch_Zip


Update EDW.DIM_Branch_Zip_backup_marlin
set division = 'FHI'
where division = 'MXH'

Update EDW.DIM_Branch_Zip 
set division = 'FHI'
where division = 'MXH'
